define i1 @icmp_dec_sub_assume_nonzero(i8 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_dec_sub_assume_nonzero(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[Z:%.*]] = icmp ne i8 [[X:%.*]], 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.assume(i1 [[Z]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C:%.*]] = icmp ult i8 [[X]], 12
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[C]]
  %z = icmp ne i8 %x, 0
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %z)
  %i = sub i8 %x, 1
  %c = icmp ult i8 %i, 11
  ret i1 %c
}

define void @runtime_unroll_generic(i32 %arg_0, ptr %arg_1, ptr %arg_2, ptr %arg_3) {
entry:
  %arg_0.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  %arg_1.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %arg_2.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %arg_3.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %k = alloca i32, align 4
  store i32 %arg_0, ptr %arg_0.addr, align 4
  store ptr %arg_1, ptr %arg_1.addr, align 8
  store ptr %arg_2, ptr %arg_2.addr, align 8
  store ptr %arg_3, ptr %arg_3.addr, align 8
  br label %for.cond

for.cond:                                         ; preds = %entry
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.cond
  br label %for.cond1

for.cond1:                                        ; preds = %for.body
  br label %for.body3

for.body3:                                        ; preds = %for.cond1
  store i32 0, ptr %k, align 4
  br label %for.cond4

for.cond4:                                        ; preds = %for.inc, %for.body3
  %0 = load i32, ptr %k, align 4
  %1 = load i32, ptr %arg_0.addr, align 4
  %cmp5 = icmp ult i32 %0, %1
  br i1 %cmp5, label %for.body6, label %for.end

for.body6:                                        ; preds = %for.cond4
  %2 = load ptr, ptr %arg_2.addr, align 8
  %arrayidx10 = getelementptr inbounds i16, ptr %2, i64 undef
  %3 = load i16, ptr %arrayidx10, align 2
  %conv = sext i16 %3 to i32
  %4 = load ptr, ptr %arg_3.addr, align 8
  %arrayidx14 = getelementptr inbounds i16, ptr %4, i64 undef
  %5 = load i16, ptr %arrayidx14, align 2
  %conv15 = sext i16 %5 to i32
  %mul16 = mul nsw i32 %conv, %conv15
  %6 = load ptr, ptr %arg_1.addr, align 8
  %arrayidx20 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %6, i64 undef
  %7 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx20, align 4
  %add21 = add nsw i32 %7, %mul16
  store i32 %add21, ptr %arrayidx20, align 4
  br label %for.inc

for.inc:                                          ; preds = %for.body6
  %8 = load i32, ptr %k, align 4
  %inc = add i32 %8, 1
  store i32 %inc, ptr %k, align 4
  br label %for.cond4, !llvm.loop !0

for.end:                                          ; preds = %for.cond4
  ret void
}

!0 = distinct !{!0, !1}
!1 = !{!"llvm.loop.mustprogress"}

tests.source_program:
define i32 @unroll(ptr nocapture readonly %a, ptr nocapture readonly %b, i32 %N) local_unnamed_addr {
entry:
  %cmp9 = icmp eq i32 %N, 0
  br i1 %cmp9, label %for.cond.cleanup, label %for.body.lr.ph

for.body.lr.ph:                                   ; preds = %entry
  %wide.trip.count = zext i32 %N to i64
  br label %for.body

for.cond.cleanup:                                 ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %c.0.lcssa = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %add, %for.body ]
  ret i32 %c.0.lcssa

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %for.body.lr.ph
  %indvars.iv = phi i64 [ 0, %for.body.lr.ph ], [ %indvars.iv.next, %for.body ]
  %c.010 = phi i32 [ 0, %for.body.lr.ph ], [ %add, %for.body ]
  %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %a, i64 %indvars.iv
  %0 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx, align 4
  %arrayidx2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %b, i64 %indvars.iv
  %1 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx2, align 4
  %mul = mul nsw i32 %1, %0
  %add = add nsw i32 %mul, %c.010
  %indvars.iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %indvars.iv, 1
  %exitcond = icmp eq i64 %indvars.iv.next, %wide.trip.count
  br i1 %exitcond, label %for.cond.cleanup, label %for.body
}

entry:
  %cmp26 = icmp sgt i32 %n, 0
  br i1 %cmp26, label %for.body, label %for.end

for.body:                                         ; preds = %if.end14, %entry
  %indvars.iv = phi i64 [ %indvars.iv.next, %if.end14 ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %A, i64 %indvars.iv
  %0 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx, align 4
  %arrayidx2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %B, i64 %indvars.iv
  %1 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx2, align 4
  %cmp3 = icmp sgt i32 %0, %1
  br i1 %cmp3, label %if.then, label %if.end14

if.then:                                          ; preds = %for.body
  %cmp6 = icmp sgt i32 %0, 19
  br i1 %cmp6, label %if.end14, label %if.else

if.else:                                          ; preds = %if.then
  %cmp10 = icmp slt i32 %1, 4
  %. = select i1 %cmp10, i32 4, i32 5
  br label %if.end14

if.end14:                                         ; preds = %if.else, %if.then, %for.body
  %x.0 = phi i32 [ 9, %for.body ], [ 3, %if.then ], [ %., %if.else ]
  store i32 %x.0, ptr %arrayidx, align 4
  %indvars.iv.next = add i64 %indvars.iv, 1
  %lftr.wideiv = trunc i64 %indvars.iv.next to i32
  %exitcond = icmp eq i32 %lftr.wideiv, %n
  br i1 %exitcond, label %for.end, label %for.body

for.end:                                          ; preds = %if.end14, %entry
  ret i32 undef
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64:64-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:64:64-f32:32:32-f64:64:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-s0:64:64-f80:128:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

define void @trunciv(ptr nocapture %a, i32 %start, i64 %k) {
for.body.preheader:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %for.body.preheader
  %indvars.iv = phi i64 [ %indvars.iv.next, %for.body ], [ 0, %for.body.preheader ]
  %trunc.iv = trunc i64 %indvars.iv to i32
  %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %a, i32 %trunc.iv
  store i32 %trunc.iv, ptr %arrayidx, align 4
  %indvars.iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %indvars.iv, 1
  %exitcond = icmp eq i64 %indvars.iv.next, %k
  br i1 %exitcond, label %exit, label %for.body

exit:                                             ; preds = %for.body
  ret void
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64:64-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:64:64-f32:32:32-f64:64:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-s0:64:64-f80:128:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

; Function Attrs: nounwind ssp uwtable
define i32 @foo(ptr nocapture %a, ptr nocapture %b, i32 %n) #0 {
entry:
  %cmp6 = icmp sgt i32 %n, 0, !dbg !4
  br i1 %cmp6, label %for.body, label %for.end, !dbg !4

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %indvars.iv = phi i64 [ %indvars.iv.next, %for.body ], [ 0, %entry ], !dbg !9
  %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %b, i64 %indvars.iv, !dbg !9
  %0 = load float, ptr %arrayidx, align 4, !dbg !9
  %mul = fmul float %0, 3.000000e+00, !dbg !9
  %arrayidx2 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %a, i64 %indvars.iv, !dbg !9
  store float %mul, ptr %arrayidx2, align 4, !dbg !9
  %indvars.iv.next = add i64 %indvars.iv, 1, !dbg !9
  %lftr.wideiv = trunc i64 %indvars.iv.next to i32, !dbg !9
  %exitcond = icmp eq i32 %lftr.wideiv, %n, !dbg !9
  br i1 %exitcond, label %for.end, label %for.body, !dbg !9

for.end:                                          ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  ret i32 undef, !dbg !10
}

attributes #0 = { nounwind ssp uwtable }

!llvm.module.flags = !{!0, !1}
!llvm.dbg.cu = !{!2}

!0 = !{i32 2, !"Dwarf Version", i32 4}
!1 = !{i32 2, !"Debug Info Version", i32 3}
!2 = distinct !DICompileUnit(language: DW_LANG_C99, file: !3, producer: "clang", isOptimized: true, flags: "-O2", runtimeVersion: 0, splitDebugFilename: "abc.debug", emissionKind: LineTablesOnly)
!3 = !DIFile(filename: "path/to/file", directory: "/path/to/dir")
!4 = !DILocation(line: 100, column: 1, scope: !5)
!5 = distinct !DISubprogram(name: "foo", scope: !6, file: !6, line: 99, type: !7, scopeLine: 100, flags: DIFlagPrototyped, spFlags: DISPFlagDefinition, unit: !2, retainedNodes: !8)
!6 = !DIFile(filename: "test.cpp", directory: "/tmp")
!7 = !DISubroutineType(types: !8)
!8 = !{}
!9 = !DILocation(line: 101, column: 1, scope: !5)
!10 = !DILocation(line: 102, column: 1, scope: !5)

issue.title: [InstCombine] Failure to avoid decrement for non-zero input to comparison
issue.body:
https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/sZ6wwS

```llvm
declare void @llvm.assume(i1)

define i1 @src(i8 %x) {
  %z = icmp ne i8 %x, 0
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %z)
  %i = add i8 %x, -1
  %c = icmp ult i8 %i, 7
  ret i1 %c
}

define i1 @tgt(i8 %x) {
  %c = icmp ule i8 %x, 7
  ret i1 %c
}
```
-->
```llvm
----------------------------------------
define i1 @src(i8 %x) denormal-fp-math=ieee,ieee {
%0:
  %z = icmp ne i8 %x, 0
  assume i1 %z
  %i = add i8 %x, 255
  %c = icmp ult i8 %i, 7
  ret i1 %c
}
=>
define i1 @tgt(i8 %x) denormal-fp-math=ieee,ieee {
%0:
  %c = icmp ule i8 %x, 7
  ret i1 %c
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
```
issue.author: RKSimon
